items.title: Updates tab: automatic or manual, pick any version
items.text: New Settings → Updates tab. Choose Automatic (download + install on next start) or Manual (an Update button appears with the new version next to it — you decide when). You can also install a specific version from a dropdown to roll back, and your current version is shown at the bottom.

items.title: Seamless updates on next start
items.text: Updates install themselves the next time you open BubblR Trainer — during the splash it swaps in the new build and relaunches once, with no dialog and no restart prompt (Krita-style).

items.title: Background images & smarter export summary
items.text: Export empty pages as YOLO negatives (Settings → Storage) to reduce false detections. The export summary counts negatives and warns about empty or imbalanced classes.

items.title: Custom classes & YOLO export
items.text: Define your own detection classes (Settings → Classes), import them from a classes.txt / data.yaml, and export classes.txt + data.yaml with an optional train/val split — train any object detector, not just manga bubbles.
